title: Quiz Show
text:
## Quiz Show

Welcome to *Who Wants to Be {adjective}!*

**Contestant:** {person} from {place}, a professional {job} with strong opinions about {plural noun}.

**For one thousand points:** Name a {place} country famous for {adjective} exports.

**For ten thousand:** Spell a {adjective} word while {verb ending in -ing} on one foot.

**Lifeline:** Phone-a-{person} went to voicemail.

**Final question:** If a {adjective} train leaves at {number} o'clock carrying {number} passengers, how many will sing?

**Answer:** {number} — because this show makes no {adjective} sense.
